hero.subtitle: GrindLab analyzes every decision in your tournaments, ranks your most costly leaks, and builds a study plan from your real data.

networks.heading: Import from where you already play
networks.subtitle: Support for hand histories from PokerStars, GGPoker and ACR (WPN). More networks coming soon.

howItWorks.heading: From HH file to precise diagnosis
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload the .txt file from any tournament (PokerStars, GGPoker or ACR). Multiple files supported at once.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Each decision is evaluated by equity, position, and MTT/SNG context. The detection engine crosses frequency with impact, and shows you exactly what's costing you chips.
howItWorks.step3Title: Improve with focus on what matters
howItWorks.step3Desc: Study plan built on your own error patterns, not generic content. Track progression through the 7-level system.

features.heading: Why GrindLab is different
features.f1Title: Your real data, not generic theory
features.f1Desc: The diagnosis is built on your own tournaments. Every identified leak exists in your real history, not in a textbook range.
features.f2Desc: ICM, M-ratio, tournament stage, and bubble. The engine evaluates every decision with the right tournament context, not isolated cash-game equity.
features.f3Desc: Study cards generated from your own error spots, plus an AI Coach that talks through your hands, not generic content.

plans.heading: Simple and transparent
plans.details: Start free. Upgrade based on how often you play.
plans.manualActivation: Paid plans activated manually by email within 24h · No credit card required
plans.proF7: Advanced AI insights (Strategic Twin, Cognitive, Causal Map)

cta.heading: Your leaks already exist. You just don't know which ones.
cta.desc: Import your first tournament now, in minutes you'll know exactly where you're losing chips.
